# Unit Testing

Create or update unit tests for the requested feature.

## Objective

Test business logic, use cases, services, utilities and critical behavior.

Avoid testing implementation details.

---

## Read First

- docs/workflow/AI_DEVELOPMENT_FRAMEWORK.md
- docs/standards/CODING_STANDARDS.md
- Project testing strategy
- specs/<feature>/spec.md

---

## Verify

Before writing tests:

- Acceptance criteria are clear.
- Critical logic is identified.
- Existing tests can be reused or extended.

---

## Testing Rules

Prioritize testing:

- Use cases
- Business rules
- Data transformations
- Validation logic
- Error handling

Avoid testing:

- Visual layout
- Internal implementation details
- Unstable UI snapshots

---

## Validation

Verify:

- Tests match acceptance criteria.
- Tests are readable.
- Tests are deterministic.
- No unnecessary mocks.

---

## Output

Generate production-ready tests.

Keep explanations minimal.
